sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96058" key="spondu/lh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπονδύλη</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπονδο-ύλιον</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπονδο-ύλιος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπονδο-υλώδης</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπονδό-υλος</orth>, <sense id="n96058.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σφονδ-</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
